# High Signal — full agent brief

Daily synthesized brief on technology, startups, and finance — five sections with inline hit-rates, no signup required.

## Index

# High Signal

Daily synthesized intelligence brief on technology, startups, and finance.

## What it is

- Five-section composed brief at `/` and `/brief`
- Inline hit-rates on market calls
- Public track record and methodology pages
- Free, no signup for the brief

## Who it's for

Operators and investors who want a high-signal daily read instead of raw feed noise.

## Agent entrypoints

- https://highsignal.app/llms.txt
- https://highsignal.app/api/ai
- https://highsignal.app/index.md
- RSS: https://highsignal.app/signals/rss

## Product links

- Daily brief: https://highsignal.app/ — Primary composed brief
- Track record: https://highsignal.app/track-record — Public hit-rate ledger
- Markets: https://highsignal.app/markets — Market signals

## Machine surfaces

- https://highsignal.app/llms.txt
- https://highsignal.app/llms-full.txt
- https://highsignal.app/api/ai
- https://highsignal.app/index.md
- https://highsignal.app/sitemap.xml
- https://highsignal.app/robots.txt
